name: Cambodia
tagline: Ancient Khmer empire and resilient spirit

scenarios.description: Immigration and customs at Cambodian airports

arrivalSteps.title: Visa / e-Visa Preparation
arrivalSteps.description: Apply for a Cambodian e-Visa (Tourist T class, USD 30 fee, 30-day single entry) at evisa.gov.kh at least 3 business days before arrival. Alternatively, Visa on Arrival (USD 30 for tourist) is available at Phnom Penh, Siem Reap, and Sihanoukville international airports. ASEAN citizens are visa-exempt.

arrivalSteps.title: Health Declaration
arrivalSteps.description: Complete the health declaration form if required at your point of entry. Yellow fever certificate is mandatory if arriving from or via a yellow fever endemic country.

arrivalSteps.title: Arrival Card Completion
arrivalSteps.description: Fill in the Cambodian arrival/departure card (available on the aircraft or at the terminal). Provide your passport details, flight number, Cambodian accommodation address, and purpose of visit.

arrivalSteps.title: Passport Control / Immigration
arrivalSteps.description: Join the foreigner queue and present your passport, e-Visa or VOA receipt, and completed arrival card. Officers will photograph you and may fingerprint you. Your passport will be stamped with the permitted duration of stay (typically 30 days).

arrivalSteps.title: Baggage Claim
arrivalSteps.description: Collect luggage from the carousel. Baggage may be screened by X-ray before you exit the customs zone.

arrivalSteps.title: Customs Declaration
arrivalSteps.description: Duty-free: 200 cigarettes or 50 cigars, 1L of spirits, and USD 200 in goods. Declare cash exceeding USD 10,000. Prohibited: narcotics, pornographic material, and weapons. Note: unofficial 'processing fees' are sometimes requested at land borders — these are not legally required.

fallbackAlerts.message: Airport officials occasionally ask for unofficial 'processing fees'. Politely decline and ask for a receipt.
Drug trafficking is a capital offence in Cambodia. Any controlled substance can lead to lengthy imprisonment.

phrases.nativeScript: តុដ្ឋានតាក់ស៊ីនៅឯណា?
ខ្ញុំត្រូវការប្ដូរប្រាក់.

scenarios.description: Angkor Wat and Khmer temple etiquette

arrivalSteps.title: Angkor Pass Required
arrivalSteps.description: Purchase your Angkor Archaeological Pass before entering Angkor Wat (1-day $37 USD, 3-day $62 USD). Checks are strict.

arrivalSteps.title: Dress Code Strictly Enforced
arrivalSteps.description: Shoulders and knees must be covered to enter Angkor Wat's inner sanctuary. Guards will turn you away.

arrivalSteps.title: Do Not Climb Restricted Areas
arrivalSteps.description: Several structures are off-limits for climbing. Fines and expulsion from the park apply.

fallbackAlerts.message: Angkor Wat requires covered shoulders and knees to enter the inner towers. No exceptions — guards enforce this strictly.
Do not touch, rub, or climb on ancient stonework. It causes irreversible damage to irreplaceable Khmer heritage.
Flash photography is prohibited inside all Angkor temple interiors to protect ancient pigments.

phrases.english: Where can I buy the Angkor Pass?
phrases.nativeScript: ខ្ញុំអាចទិញប័ណ្ណអង្គរនៅឯណា?
phrases.romanized: Khnyom ach tinh ban Angkor nov aena?

phrases.nativeScript: តើអាចថតរូបខាងក្នុងបានទេ?
phrases.romanized: Tae ach that roup khang knong ban te?

scenarios.description: Tuk-tuk negotiation and transport safety in Cambodia

arrivalSteps.title: Negotiate Before You Board
arrivalSteps.description: Always agree on a fare before getting into a tuk-tuk. There are no meters. Grab and PassApp offer fixed prices.

arrivalSteps.title: USD is Widely Accepted
arrivalSteps.description: USD and Cambodian Riel are both accepted everywhere. Change is often given in Riel.

fallbackAlerts.message: Use app-based rides (PassApp, Grab) after dark. Verify the driver before getting in.
Tuk-tuk prices are entirely negotiable. The starting price quoted to tourists is usually double the fair rate.

phrases.english: How much to the Old Market?
phrases.nativeScript: ទៅផ្សារចាស់ថ្លៃប៉ុន្មាន?

phrases.english: Please take me to this address.
phrases.nativeScript: សូមបង្ហាញផ្លូវខ្ញុំទៅអាសយដ្ឋាននេះ.
phrases.romanized: Som banghanh plov khnyom tov asayadthan nis.
